SEARCH

Package edu.yu.marketmaker.persistence

package edu.yu.marketmaker.persistence
JPA-based persistence infrastructure for the Market Maker application.

This package provides the persistence layer used to back Hazelcast's distributed in-memory storage with durable JPA/database storage via Hazelcast MapStore integrations:

  • IdentifiableEntity - Base JPA entity providing a common identity contract for all persistable domain objects.
  • BaseJpaRepository - Base Spring Data JPA repository interface for IdentifiableEntity subclasses.
  • ExternalOrderEntity - JPA entity representing a persisted ExternalOrder.
  • ExternalOrderMapStore - Hazelcast MapStore bridging the ExternalOrder distributed map to JPA.
  • FillEntity - JPA entity representing a persisted Fill.
  • FillMapStore - Hazelcast MapStore bridging the Fill distributed map to JPA.
  • PositionEntity - JPA entity representing a persisted Position.
  • PositionMapStore - Hazelcast MapStore bridging the Position distributed map to JPA.
  • Related Packages

    Description

    Root package for the Market Maker application.
    edu.yu.marketmaker.persistence.interfaces
    Persistence interfaces for the Market Maker application.

    Description
    BaseJpaRepository<E,K>
    Base JPA repository interface for entities with identifiable keys.
    ExternalOrderEntity
    JPA Entity for ExternalOrder records used by Hazelcast MapStore.
    ExternalOrderMapStore
    Hazelcast MapStore implementation for ExternalOrder records.
    FillEntity
    JPA Entity for Fill records used by Hazelcast MapStore.
    FillMapStore
    Hazelcast MapStore implementation for Fill records.
    IdentifiableEntity<K>
    Interface for JPA entities that can provide their own unique identifier.
    PositionEntity
    Entity used by hazelcast
    PositionMapStore
    Hazelcast MapStore implementation for Position records.
    QuoteEntity
    JPA Entity for Quote records used by Hazelcast MapStore.
    QuoteMapStore
    Hazelcast MapStore implementation for Quote records.
    ReservationEntity
    JPA Entity for Reservation records used by Hazelcast MapStore.
    ReservationMapStore
    Hazelcast MapStore implementation for Reservation records.
